name: Nigerian Communications Commission
statute: Consumer Code of Practice Regulations 2007 & Quality of Service Regulations

obligations.title: Publish a General Consumer Code of Practice
obligations.description: Publish and maintain a NCC-approved Consumer Code of Practice covering service descriptions, billing, complaint handling, and privacy.

obligations.title: Submit Quality of Service reports
obligations.description: File monthly QoS performance reports (call setup success rate, drop call rate, data latency where applicable) to NCC.

obligations.title: SIM registration & NIN linkage
obligations.description: Register subscribers under the NCC / NIMC SIM registration framework with verified NIN, retain records, and disable unlinked SIMs.

obligations.title: Report major service outages
obligations.description: Report outages affecting >10,000 subscribers or critical infrastructure to NCC within 4 hours, with full RCA within 14 days.

obligations.title: Pay Annual Operating Levy (AOL)
obligations.description: Pay the Annual Operating Levy computed on net operating revenue by the due date set in the current AOL circular.
